project.title: Identification of interactors of AtNRG1B after treatment with Pfo carrying avrRps4 effector
project.projectDescription: NRG1.2 is a helper NLR required for RRS1 RPS4 mediated immunity. RPS4 recognizes effector avrRps4 from pathogen P. syringae leading to hypersensitive response and immunity. here we co-immunoprecipitate NRG1.2-HF to identify interacting proteins upon effector recognition
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: NRG1.2-HF was co-IP from Arabidopsis leaf extracts infiltrated with Pfo carrying empty vector or Pfo carrying avrRps4
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Raw files were peak picked with MS-convert to generate mgf files. MGF files were used in Mascot Deamonand searched against Arapaort 11 fasta file and contanminant fasta files as database. Mascot files were imported into Scaffold to visualize and valide MS/MS-based peptide and protein identifications

references.referenceLine: Sun X, Lapin D, Feehan JM, Stolze SC, Kramer K, Dongus JA, Rzemieniewski J, Blanvillain-Baufumé S, Harzen A, Bautor J, Derbyshire P, Menke FLH, Finkemeier I, Nakagami H, Jones JDG, Parker JE. Pathogen effector recognition-dependent association of NRG1 with EDS1 and SAG101 in TNL receptor immunity. Nat Commun. 2021 12(1):3335
